function.name: glob
function.description: Match files using a single glob pattern with context-aware matching and workspace integration. Provides pattern validation and intelligent defaults.

path.description: Base path to search from (defaults to workspace root). Supports workspace-relative paths.

pattern.description: Glob pattern to match. Pattern is validated and enhanced automatically.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 50)

case_sensitive.description: Case-sensitive matching (default: false on Windows/macOS, true on Linux)

commonErrors.suggestedAction: Use find_files for more flexible pattern matching or simplify pattern

commonErrors.solution: No files match the glob pattern
commonErrors.suggestedAction: Verify pattern is correct and files exist. Try find_files for broader search

commonErrors.pattern: path not found|directory does not exist
commonErrors.suggestedAction: Use ls to explore directory structure

suggestions.tooSpecific: Pattern might be too specific, try broader pattern
suggestions.tooGeneral: Pattern might match too many files, consider being more specific
